title: Fermentation Products Analysis
description: Code, data, and analysis quantifying the varying harvest of fermentation products from the human gut microbiota across dietary conditions.

title: Envelope Proteome and the Density Maintenance Model
description: Code and analysis for the study of cytoplasmic and membrane density maintenance and its role in shaping cellular geometry in E. coli.

title: Diurnal Growth Variation Modeling
description: Modeling and analysis of diurnal variations in gut microbial growth dynamics driven by host feeding rhythms.

title: hplc-py
description: A Python package for rapid, automated peak quantification in complex chromatograms. Designed for high-throughput analysis of HPLC data in microbial physiology experiments.

title: Optimal Allocation and Flux Parity Model
description: Code and analysis for the flux parity model of optimal resource allocation in microbial growth.

title: Collective Movement by Chemotaxis
description: Simulations and analysis of collective bacterial range expansion driven by chemotaxis.

title: Analyzing Bacterial Swimming Behavior
description: Tools for quantifying individual bacterial swimming trajectories and run-tumble statistics from microscopy data.

title: Modeling Growth of Human Gut Microbiota
description: Mathematical models linking bacterial physiology, flow, and nutrient gradients to microbiota composition in the human gut.
